_comment: Universal QA Rules Schema template. Copy this, fill in, and commit into any repo root as qa-rules.json for run-qa-loop to pick up.

project.name: YOUR_PROJECT_NAME
project.brand: One-sentence description of the visual brand standard. The AI uses this to anchor all judgments.

semantic_rules.description: Natural language assertion passed to Midscene aiAssert(). Write in plain English what must be true visually on the page.
semantic_rules._comment_severity: critical = run blocks if fails, high = warns + logs, medium = logs only
semantic_rules._comment_viewports: Optional. Omit to run on all viewports. Use viewport names from viewports[] above.

visual_routes.name: ROUTE_NAME
visual_routes._comment_pre_actions: Actions run before snapshot to ensure lazy content is loaded. Available: scroll_to_bottom, scroll_to_top, wait_ms, click (selector), fill (selector, text)
